properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am not worthy for your love I don't deserve your Amazing Grace I have no rights to ask You, Lord. But I, I am nothing without You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We are not worthy for you love We don't deserve your Amazing Grace We have no rights to ask You, Lord, But We, were nothing without you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We will sing only for You, Lord. Giving these hymns, only for You. We, will lift our hands, to proclaim Your Holy Name These are not enough, for all the love You have given to us… But We pledge, pledging our allegiance to You…

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You have never failed us Lord. You lead, us into Your ways. You looked beyond our faults You, are only the absolute Lord.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: These are not enough, for all the love You have given to us… But We pledge, pledging our allegiance to You
